title: A -nor-Triterpenoid from Zizyphus jujubα
author: D N MONDAL
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
Chemical Research Unit (CCRAS), Regional Research lnstitute (Ay), CN-4, Sector-V, Bidhannagar, Calcutta-700 091 

  Manuscript received 1 July 1997, accepted 28 August 1997  

 A triterpcnoid A-norlupa-2,20-diene-14,17-dicarboxylic acid has been isolated from the leaves of  Zizyphus   jujubα .
